ThingDef.Name: Item_Dan_MuLingDan_T1
ThingDef.Desc: An elixir refined from common wood. Take to increase Max Qi by 1,000.

ThingDef.Name: Item_Dan_MuLingDan_T2
ThingDef.Desc: An elixir refined from common wood. Take to increase Max Qi by 10,000.

ThingDef.Name: Item_Dan_MuLingDan_T3
ThingDef.Desc: An elixir refined from common wood. Take to increase Max Qi by 100,000.

ThingDef.Name: Item_Dan_MuLingDan_T4
ThingDef.Desc: An elixir refined from common wood. Take to increase Max Qi by 1,000,000.
